title: Lazy Basil Breeze
description: A smoky and flaky vegan-friendly dish featuring fresh basil on a lazy Sunday in Saudi Arabian cuisine.
instructions: Wash basil leaves and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small saucepan, mix olive oil, lemon juice, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper together. Stir well until smoked paprika is fully dissolved into the mixture.
Fold in the fresh basil leaves to coat evenly.
Let it simmer over low heat for about 10 minutes until the basil becomes fragrant and slightly wilted but still crispy on top.
Gently fold in more lemon juice if desired for a brighter flavor contrast.
